# Fork: caveman (trimmed)

- **Upstream:** https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/tree/main/skills/productivity/caveman
- **Also see:** https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman (extended intensity levels)
- **Pinned:** 2026-05-31

## Local changes

- **Removed:** lite / full / ultra / wenyan-lite / wenyan-full / wenyan-ultra intensity levels and `/caveman lite|full|ultra` switching
- **Kept:** core terse rules, persistence, auto-clarity exception, examples
- **Reason:** simpler personal default; one mode only

To merge upstream: diff `caveman/SKILL.md` against mattpocock or JuliusBrussee; re-apply trim or adopt new levels deliberately.
